title: oracc_index_project data payload
description: Structured payload for the `oracc_index_project` tool. PRIMARY path: downloads + unzips the build-oracc bundle ZIP (https://build-oracc.museum.upenn.edu/json/<SLUG>.zip; SLUG = project pathname with '/'->'-'; CCP ships as 'ccpo'), caches the extracted catalogue.json + corpus.json + corpusjson/*.json under getCacheDir()/oracc/<SLUG>/, and enumerates texts from catalogue.json WITH per-text genre/period/provenience/designation/cdli_id. Two payload shapes are possible: (A) the bundle shape (ingest_channel='bundle', total/editions_available/genres/periods/sample), and (B) the legacy pager-fallback shape (ingest_channel in corpusjson/tei/pager-only/unavailable, text_ids/reported_total) used only when a project's bundle is unavailable.

ingest_channel.description: 'bundle' = build-oracc bundle ingest (primary, metadata attaches). The rest are legacy live-mirror fallback channels.

url.description: Source URL (bundle zip url for the bundle channel; pager url for fallbacks).

from_cache.description: true when the extracted bundle was reused from the on-disk cache rather than re-downloaded.

total.description: Total texts catalogued in the bundle (== catalogue members).

editions_available.description: Non-stub corpusjson editions present in the bundle.

genres.description: Top genre buckets (genre -> count) from catalogue.json.

periods.description: Top period buckets (period -> count) from catalogue.json.

sample.description: Paged sample of catalogued texts with attached metadata.

cached.description: true when served from the on-disk cache.

pager_available.description: (fallback) whether the pager responded with a parseable page.

text_ids.description: (fallback) deduped [PQX]NNNNN ids enumerated from the pager.
